Dysphagia Knowledge Hub — 吞嚥困難知識庫

Dysphagia Testing and Assessment Guide Collection

Accurate assessment of swallowing function is the foundation of safe dysphagia management. This section covers validated screening tools (EAT-10), instrumental assessment comparisons (FEES vs MBSS), and practical step-by-step guides for performing IDDSI food texture tests at home or in clinical settings.

All Testing Guides

  • The Eating Assessment Tool (EAT-10): Complete Clinician and Patient Guide
  • FEES vs MBSS — Comparing the Two Gold-Standard Dysphagia Instrumental Exams (2026)
  • How to Test Food Texture for Dysphagia — IDDSI Tests Step by Step
